title: Executive Order 8476—Waiver of the Time Limitations in Civil Service Rule IX To Permit the Reinstatement of Mrs. Martha Overstreet to a Clerical Position in the Post Office at Douglas, Georgia

flags.justification: A narrow, specific waiver of a procedural time limit under an existing statutory waiver authority.
A clear, specific, individual personnel action.
A personnel action creating no compliance regime.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.
A one-time reinstatement, not an ongoing authority grant.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
An extremely narrow, individual-specific personnel accommodation.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (negative). Structural weight: 0/10 = 0.0%. A compassionate personnel accommodation for the widow of a deceased Post Office Inspector.
